verdict_reasoning: TMED10 is a p24 cargo receptor with 4 transmembrane domains localized exclusively to the ER-Golgi transport system. It cycles between the ER and Golgi via COPII and COPI vesicles as part of anterograde and retrograde transport. No documented PM pool, cancer-ecto display, cell-death-induced surface translocation, tissue-restricted surface display, or lysosomal-exocytosis pathway. Strictly endomembrane-resident.
